stem: A circular patio has a diameter of 14 feet. What is the area, in square feet, of the patio?
explanation: The area of a circle is $A = \pi r^2$. The diameter is 14 feet, so the radius is $r = 7$ feet. $A = \pi(7)^2 = 49\pi$ square feet. The answer is C.

distractorRationale.A: Uses the diameter instead of the radius: $\pi(14)^2 = 196\pi$.
distractorRationale.B: Uses the circumference formula with the radius: $2\pi(7) = 14\pi$.
distractorRationale.D: Omits the exponent on $r$: $\pi(7) = 7\pi$ instead of $\pi(7)^2$.
